Info

Encapsulates core runtime components for simplification of LoggerBundle creation.

class ats_utilities.logger.logger_registry.LoggerRegistry[source]¶

Bases: IRegistry[LoggerBundle, LoggerParams]

Encapsulates core runtime components for simplification of LoggerBundle creation.

It defines:

methods:
create_bundle - Creates a LoggerBundle.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
classmethod create_bundle(params: LoggerParams) → LoggerBundle[source]¶

Creates a LoggerBundle instance.

Parameters:

params (LoggerParams) – Registry-specific orchestration parameters.

Returns:

LoggerBundle instance.

Return type:

<LoggerBundle>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Log file must be provided.
ATSValueError: Log level must be provided.
ATSTypeError: Log file must be a string.
ATSTypeError: Log level must be an integer.
